name: Marcus Webb — No Heat
staffBriefing: Marcus Webb is home alone at 212 Maple Ridge Court. His boiler stopped producing heat overnight — no warm radiators anywhere, no hot water either. He reset it and checked the pilot light himself, no luck. It's 34°F outside and dropping into the 20s tonight; he's worried about pipes freezing. It's never given him trouble before — it just died last night (this signals a 'No Heat' repair call, not routine 'Boiler Service' maintenance on a working system). If asked about cooling or AC, remind them it's the dead of winter — that's not the issue. Give his phone number only if asked.
